Resume Contact Me

My Projects

Chat Plus Plus

A terminal-based chat app in modern C++ featuring a custom client-server architecture, a plugin system, and a crash-safe TUI, deployed via a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline.

View More
Status: Completed

Homelab

A self-hosted infrastructure playground running containerized services, CI/CD pipelines, and secure Cloudflare-tunneled access, built to experiment with networking, orchestration, and automation.

View More
Status: Ongoing

Last Ember

A fast-paced 2D survival game built in Unity/C#, featuring random events and obstacles designed to test how long you can last, with fully custom, original art.

View More
Status: Completed

Mini WC

A low-level implementation of the Unix `wc` utility built entirely in x86-64 assembly to deepen my understanding of Linux system calls and file I/O.

View More
Status: Completed

Space Game

A fast-paced 2D/3D space shooter where players explore, battle enemies, and upgrade their ship to survive increasingly difficult waves.

View More
Status: Completed

System Breach

A pixel art stealth-action game built in Unity 6 LTS, following rogue android Unit 404 as he escapes the corporate facility of Everwatch.

View More
Status: Ongoing

Todo App

A responsive web to-do app that lets users manage, share, and synchronize task lists across multiple devices.

View More
Status: Completed
